subcodes.first_line: Today the solace of 'Abdu'l-Bahá is the love, submissiveness and humility of the friends towards one another, and the reality of heartfelt love and complete self-effacement [3.5s]... ...Thou shouldst endeavour to study the science of medicine. It is extremely useful and serveth as the greatest instrument for the dissemination of the Cause
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم تسلّی عبدالبهاء محبت و خضوع و خشوع احباء است بیکدیگر و تا حقیقت محبت قلبیه و نهایت محویت
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @love and unity, @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @power of prayer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
